Title: The Dating App Plot Device
Description: I've always been interested in how dating apps work. You really only have two choices if you want to get in the business.

Title: A native graphical shell for SSH
HCCF’s Vision for a Human-Centered Top-Level Domain – Human-Centered Computing Foundation
Description: The Internet is the most powerful communication tool ever created, yet the infrastructure underpinning it has been leveraged by the tech industry to extract our data and exploit our attention. The Human-Centered Computing Foundation seeks to change this dynamic by creating an alternative architecture for the web. As an approved participant in ICANN’s Applicant Support Program (ASP), we are officially launching our campaign to secure a new Top-Level Domain (TLD) dedicated entirely to ethical, human-centered technology.
